creator: jack@diamond.xtalwind.net
text:
When using the upgrade option on sysinstall the schg flag is not cleared
	on userland binaries.  Those binaries are not updated. Running a 
	previous version of ld.so breaks lots of things.

Fix: 

Clear all userland binaries schg flags before beginning the upgrade.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Choose the upgrade option from 3.0-970502-SNAP sysinstall.
